sources.title: Monster On Campus
sources.description: The blood of a primitive fish exposed to gamma rays causes a benign research professor to regress to an ape-like, bloodthirsty prehistoric hominid.

sources.title: MONSTER ON THE CAMPUS 1958 colorized
sources.description: A college professor acquires a newly discovered specimen of a prehistoric fish. While examining the find he is accidentally exposed to it's blood, turning him into a murderous Neanderthal.

metadata.Plot: A college professor acquires a newly discovered specimen of a prehistoric fish. While examining the find he is accidentally exposed to it's blood, turning him into a murderous Neanderthal.
metadata.Actors: Arthur Franz, Joanna Moore, Judson Pratt
